title: Omikron: The Nomad Soul

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: The game freezes on the start menu (using arrows triggers sound which suggests that the menu is working, but the picture is not working at all). No workaround seems to work. The gog.com version works without problems out of the box on Wine 3.0.3 (default Wine config, no additional installations, fullscreen 1600x1200 res, 2560x1440 res - everything just works). As this is allegedly identical to the GOG version, this behavior is bizarre. What am I missing here?
